annexure_reference: Annexure C: Bantjes drafts SARS response with attachments (8 Jun 2025)
pipeline: Neon DB → Graph API body/attachment sync → EML generation → Transport header fetch

envelope.subject: Re: SARS query re the two big inter company invoices at the end of February 2025

body.preview:
Hi Rynette

Attached is a rough draft of what I think we need to have in our reply to the SARS VAT query on RST.

I'll phone you on Monday to discuss and fill in the blanks.


Kind regards,

Danie Bantjes


On Fri, 6 Jun 2025 at 09:29, Rynette
